name: @val-protocol/qes-validator
description: Optional eIDAS QES (Qualified Electronic Signature) validator for VAL Profile C. Validates a qualified signature to ETSI standards (X.509-to-LOTL, QcStatements, OCSP/CRL, JAdES, LTV) and emits a reproducible QesValidationReport that the zero-dep @val-protocol/chain-verifier consumes. SCAFFOLD — implementation demand-gated (ADR 0063, S1: wrap EU DSS). NOT published.
